title: Daria Rae (FKA Sonya Deville) Re-Signs With TNA
summary: It was revealed on Thursday that Daria Rae, the former Sonya Deville in WWE, has re-signed with TNA.

fullArticle:
TNA on-screen authority figure, Daria Rae, the former Sonya Deville in WWE, has officially re-signed with the company, it was announced Thursday ahead of "TNA iMPACT." Fightful Select confirmed the news, and received a statement from the company.

The statement called Rae, the Director of Operations alongside Santino Marella's Director of Authority, a "key part" of "iMPACT." Rae made her surprise debut in the company on the debut episode of the show on the AMC network, back in January.

Rae left WWE after 10 years in February 2025 after it was revealed the company would not be renewing her contract.
